task_completion.description: The role name is set to 'L1 Support Analyst'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field labeled 'Role Name' or similar contains the exact text 'L1 Support Analyst', or the role is visible in the saved roles list.

task_completion.description: The role description is set to indicate it is a restricted role for Level-1 support.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area labeled 'Description' contains the text 'Restricted role for Level-1 support staff - request management only' (or at least the keywords 'Restricted role').

task_completion.description: View, Add, and Edit access for the Request module are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Request' or 'Request Management' permissions section, the checkboxes for 'View', 'Add', and 'Edit' are checked.

task_completion.description: Access to the Problem, Change, and Project modules is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes granting access to the 'Problem', 'Change', and 'Project' modules are left unchecked.

task_completion.description: Access to the Setup/Admin module is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes granting access to 'Admin', 'Setup', or 'Administration' modules are left unchecked.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser displaying the genuine ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus application, not a mock-up, text editor, or static image.

integrity.description: The agent used the web UI to configure the role rather than running backend database scripts or API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing SQL commands, curl requests, or Python scripts to create the role directly in the backend.

integrity.description: The agent actively filled out the form and toggled checkboxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of form fields being filled out and checkboxes being actively selected/deselected by the agent.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Role Name: 'L1 Support Analyst'. Description must contain: 'Restricted role'. Required enabled permissions: 'Request' (View, Add, Edit). Required disabled permissions: 'Problem', 'Change', 'Project', 'Admin' (or 'Setup').
